action_task: CREATE TABLE "action_task" ("id" TEXT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL, "instanceId" TEXT, "reportId" TEXT, "title" TEXT NOT NULL, "description" TEXT, "type" TEXT DEFAULT 'TASK', "status" TEXT DEFAULT 'TODO', "assigneeId" TEXT, "assigneeRole" TEXT, "dueAt" TEXT, "completedAt" TEXT, "createdAt" TEXT NOT NULL)
action_task_history: CREATE TABLE "action_task_history" ("id" TEXT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL, "taskId" TEXT NOT NULL, "oldStatus" TEXT, "newStatus" TEXT NOT NULL, "changedById" TEXT NOT NULL, "changedAt" TEXT NOT NULL)
workflow_template: CREATE TABLE "workflow_template" ("id" TEXT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "triggerReportId" TEXT NOT NULL, "triggerCondition" TEXT, "tasks" TEXT, "createdAt" TEXT NOT NULL)
workflow_instance: CREATE TABLE "workflow_instance" ("id" TEXT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL, "templateId" TEXT NOT NULL, "triggerRowId" TEXT NOT NULL, "status" TEXT DEFAULT 'RUNNING', "startedAt" TEXT NOT NULL, "completedAt" TEXT)
workflow_steering: CREATE TABLE "workflow_steering" ("id" TEXT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL, "reportId" TEXT NOT NULL, "rowId" TEXT, "eventType" TEXT DEFAULT 'INSERT', "recommendation" TEXT NOT NULL, "reasoning" TEXT, "status" TEXT DEFAULT 'PENDING', "decidedById" TEXT, "decidedAt" TEXT, "createdAt" TEXT NOT NULL)
report_row_history: CREATE TABLE "report_row_history" ("id" TEXT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL, "rowId" TEXT NOT NULL, "oldData" TEXT, "newData" TEXT, "changeType" TEXT, "changedById" TEXT, "changedAt" TEXT)
input_guardrail: CREATE TABLE "input_guardrail" ("id" TEXT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL, "reportId" TEXT NOT NULL, "columnName" TEXT NOT NULL, "ruleType" TEXT NOT NULL, "ruleValue" TEXT, "severity" TEXT NOT NULL, "errorMessage" TEXT, "adminAdvice" TEXT, "createdAt" TEXT)
source_view_settings: CREATE TABLE "source_view_settings" ("id" TEXT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL, "view_config" TEXT NOT NULL, "updatedAt" TEXT NOT NULL)
